technical_replicate: biotin switch assay, which converts labile S-nitrosothiols into stable biotinylated thiols detectable by immunoblotting.
experimental_design: we investigated the effects of different NO donors on melanoma cell growth and p53 modification.
factor_value: treatment with S-nitrosoglutathione (GSNO) or diethylenetriamine (DETA) NONOate significantly increased total S-nitrosylated proteins.
number_of_fractions: biotin switch assay but no specific fractions mentioned
